videos.description: The Knicks complete their largest fourth-quarter comeback since 2023 with a 108-106 win over the Rockets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks erase 18-point 4th-quarter deficit to stun Rockets) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Knicks erase 18-point 4th-quarter deficit to stun Rockets

videos.description: OG Anunoby goes vertical for a two-handed jam on Alperen Sengun for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (OG Anunoby rises over Alperen Sengun for a dunk) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: OG Anunoby rises over Alperen Sengun for a dunk

videos.description: Clint Capela makes a great defensive play to block Karl-Anthony Towns for the Rockets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Clint Capela swats KAT at the rim) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clint Capela swats KAT at the rim

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns scores a basket over Kevin Durant for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT bodies KD for a bucket) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: KAT bodies KD for a bucket

videos.description: Amen Thompson finds an opening in the lane and dunks it for the Rockets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson takes off for a ferocious slam) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amen Thompson takes off for a ferocious slam

videos.description: Kevin Durant elevates over his defender for a Rockets bucket.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD knocks down a silky jumper) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: KD knocks down a silky jumper

videos.description: OG Anunoby works his way inside for an easy bucket.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (OG Anunoby gets to the basket for a Knicks layup) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: OG Anunoby gets to the basket for a Knicks layup

videos.description: OG Anunoby pokes the ball loose from Kevin Durant and rises for a breakaway dunk.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (OG Anunoby strips KD for a Knicks slam) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: OG Anunoby strips KD for a Knicks slam

videos.description: Jalen Brunson scores a tough jumper over Kevin Durant for the Knicks, then Kevin Durant returns the favor with a Rockets and-1.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson and KD trade buckets) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brunson and KD trade buckets

videos.description: Amen Thompson flies to the rim on a slam dunk for the Rockets.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson takes flight on a breakaway slam) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amen Thompson takes flight on a breakaway slam

videos.description: Landry Shamet drives strong to the basket for a layup plus the foul.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet blows by for a Knicks and-1) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Landry Shamet blows by for a Knicks and-1

videos.description: Kevin Durant hits the bottom of the net on a 3-pointer for the Rockets.
videos.headline: KD swishes a corner 3

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns throws it down over Jabari Smith Jr. for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT fired up after big dunk) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: KAT fired up after big dunk

videos.description: Jalen Brunson gives the Knicks a two-point lead and OG Anunoby forces Kevin Durant to take a tough jumper late in fourth.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson gives the Knicks a two-point lead and OG) 2026/02/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalen Brunson gives the Knicks a two-point lead and OG

videos.description: Shaquille O'Neal gives advice to Karl-Anthony Towns on winning a championship while giving him credit for his performance in the Knicks’ win over the Rockets.
